allow: PowerShell(Start-Process "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(3\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { $v = docker info --format "{{.ServerVersion}}" 2>$null; if \($v\) { "daemon up: $v"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 }; if \(-not $v\) { "daemon did not start in time" })

PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\ADMIN\\openwaste-intelligence; $deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); do { $ok = docker exec owi-db-1 pg_isready -U owi 2>$null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline -and -not \($ok -match "accepting"\)\); $ok; cd api; python -m uv run alembic upgrade head 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell($deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(45\); do { try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/healthz -TimeoutSec 2 } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline -and -not $h\); if \($h\) { "server up: $\($h.status\)" } else { "server not responding" })
